articles.title: BBC Says Sorry for Bad Word on TV
articles.summary: The BBC, a TV company, said they made a mistake during a Bafta awards show. A person with Tourette's shouted a very mean racial word while actors were giving out an award. This bad word was not taken out of the TV broadcast that aired later on BBC One and stayed on iPlayer, a streaming service, until the next morning. Many people complained about this. The BBC's complaints unit said this was wrong and broke their rules, but it was not done on purpose. The team editing the show did not hear the word, so they did not remove it. They did remove another use of the same word later. The BBC said leaving the show on iPlayer for so long made the problem worse. They promised to learn from this and make their processes better to stop it from happening again.

articles.title: Cardi B's Credit Card Trouble
articles.summary: Cardi B is a famous rapper who had a big problem with her credit card. She lost her American Express card, and thieves used it to buy expensive things like designer clothes and Apple products. They spent $60,000 in total, which is a lot of money. Cardi B found out because her phone gets a notification every time her card is used. She was on tour and not shopping much, so she knew something was wrong when she saw the big purchases. She got CCTV footage showing four men using her card and wants them to go to jail. Cardi B is very rich but still watches her money closely. She told her fans about this in a live video on Instagram.

articles.title: TV Show Episode Not Shown Because of DJ's Problem
articles.summary: A TV channel called Channel 4 decided not to show a special episode of a baking show called The Great British Bake Off. This episode had a famous DJ named Scott Mills in it. Scott Mills used to work for the BBC radio, but he was fired because of a serious accusation from the past. The police looked into it before and did not charge him with a crime. Channel 4 said the accusation is very serious, so they think it is not right to air the episode now. They will show a different episode instead. Scott Mills was also supposed to be in a concert with a band called Boyzone, but he is not on the list anymore. He also stopped being an ambassador for a charity that helps people with a disease called multiple sclerosis. The charity said he was important to them for over 10 years, but he is stepping back while they check the situation.

articles.title: India's Airplane Problem: Too Few Big Planes
articles.summary: India has a big problem with airplanes. Willie Walsh, who will soon be the boss of IndiGo, India's biggest airline, says it's a 'scandal' that India only has 50 widebody aircraft. Widebody planes are large, twin-aisle airplanes that can carry many people on long trips, like to other countries. India has 1.4 billion people and is growing fast, so it needs more of these big planes to connect people by air. Walsh talked to the BBC about this issue. He didn't comment on IndiGo's recent problems, where they had to cancel thousands of flights because of new rules for pilots. Instead, he focused on how India's aviation market is expanding but is held back by not having enough widebody aircraft. This shortage makes it hard for people to travel long distances without stopping. Walsh believes India should have many more widebody planes to match its size and potential.

articles.title: A Big Ship Brings Oil from Venezuela to the USA
articles.summary: A huge ship called the Minerva Gloria is bringing oil from Venezuela to the United States. This was not allowed before because of rules called sanctions, but now it is happening. Venezuela has a lot of oil, but it was not being sold much because of problems there. The US President wanted to use this oil, so after a change in Venezuela, oil started flowing again. Companies like Chevron are now bringing this oil to the US in ships. Chevron has a big refinery in Mississippi that can turn the heavy, thick Venezuelan oil into things like gasoline for cars. This means more oil is available, which could make gas prices cheaper for people in the US. The oil is special because it is heavy and needs special refineries to process it.

articles.title: Wireless Festival Cancelled Because Kanye West Can't Come to the UK
articles.summary: The Wireless Festival, a big music event in London, has been cancelled this summer. It was cancelled because Kanye West, a famous rapper also known as Ye, was not allowed to come to the UK. The government said no to his travel because of his past bad comments about Jewish people and support for Hitler. The festival organizers said they are sorry and will give money back to people who bought tickets. They also said they talked to many people before booking Kanye and no one had concerns then. Kanye has said he wants to talk to Jewish people in the UK to make things better. Tickets for the festival sold out quickly before it was cancelled.
